message:
fix(web): reject IPv6 zone IDs in VPS IP validation

Zone IDs (e.g., %eth0, %br-abc123) are only meaningful for link-local
addresses on local interfaces. For remote VPS connections over the
internet, they are not valid and could indicate user error.

- Add explicit check to reject any IP containing % character
- Add documentation explaining the rejection rationale
- Simplify regex by removing zone ID handling

Closes: bkgs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
